fields.summary: The ability for custom fonts to be available in the font picker list within Workstation

content.text: Yahoo have a set of custom Yahoo fonts that they use on Dossiers in Web and Library, and the goal is to do the same from within Workstation. Text using these custom fonts does render properly within Workstation if they've already been chosen in Library, but the request is for the fonts to be available in the font picker list within Workstation.
For the custom fonts to appear in the custom font picker within Workstation
[-]Custom fonts cannot be added to the font picker within Workstation

Reports and dossiers that are created via Workstation are not able to use the Yahoo custom font since this font does not appear as part of the font picker. Objects have be created via Web or Library for the font to be used.
[-]This is already on the roadmap to be implemented via US481058
) changed its Component to [990 Tech Support Work Item] because its Module is set to [990.000 Tech Support Work Item].
Account: Yahoo Holdings Inc., Owner: Alvaro Mendoza (RSS), Creator: endicott@yahoo-inc.com
The ability for custom fonts to be available in the font picker list within Workstation

Reports and dossiers that are created via Workstation are not able to use the Yahoo custom font since this font does not appear as part of the font picker. Objects have be created via Web or Library for the font to be used.

Yahoo have a set of custom Yahoo fonts that they use on Dossiers in Web and Library, and the goal is to do the same from within Workstation. Text using these custom fonts does render properly within Workstation if they've already been chosen in Library, but the request is for the fonts to be available in the font picker list within Workstation.
@Shruthi Mulagada please reassign the ER to correct Feature - custom fond in Dashboard editor.
Associated to ServiceNow Case: CS0868332, Account: Bank Of America, Owner: Carlos Rodriguez (RSS), Creator: pawel.halicki@bofa.com
Add custom fonts to Workstation font picker

Web, Library, and Workstation showing the same font picker while being connected to UAT environment. Web and Library have a customization (based on instructions from KB37127) that adds Calibri font to the list and it works. Workstation is not showing this font while we’re connected to the same Library instance – The customer is looking for a way to add this in Workstation as well.

The Calibri font is widely used in our environment (65k users) and users are complaining about lack of parity between Web/Library and Workstation. The users have recently introduced Workstation as a client tool and replacement of Developer, and missing elements like a single font are stopping users from transitioning from Developer and Web to Workstation (because they cannot apply correct font, and have to switch between clients and interfaces).

The user would like to open an Enhancement Request to add the ability to add custom fonts to the font picker in Workstation. The user can customize the Web and Library with fontNamesPicker.xml, but they do not see any options that would let them do the same in Workstation (and the user needs it to maintain parity between all client interfaces).
The customer is running MicroStrategy One September 2024.
@Wei Jiang (PO)  Can you please follow up ?

@wjiang @aolvera @wjiang The Production Release of this customer enhancement request [US534876] was updated to 25.06 be the same as that of its parent Feature [F38110] so it matches when it will be delivered along with the Feature.

@wjiang @ @wjiang The Production Release of this customer enhancement request [US534876] was updated to 26-H1 be the same as that of its parent Feature [F43767] so it matches when it will be delivered along with the Feature.
Associated to ServiceNow Case: CS0943992, Account: OBI Smart Technologies GmbH, Owner: Dhanush Genupudi (CSE), Creator: servicecloud@microstrategy.com
Ability to have custom font in workstation
Customer is unable to use custom fonts in workstation that affects group of developers

The customer has reported that the font picker in Strategy Workstation does not display any custom fonts. While users can customize the web and library interfaces using the fontNamespicker.xml file, they do not see any options to do the same in the Workstation. The customer would like to ensure consistency across all interfaces.
Associated to ServiceNow Case: CS0961172, Account: Starbucks Coffee Company, Owner: Mohit Kumar (CSE), Creator: mokumar@microstrategy.com

content.text: [Dashboard AG grid] Some of the grid cell will not show when connecting to 25.0304 server by 25.06 workstation.

Run dashboard "Dashboard, AG Grid", scroll up/down in the grid >> issue here: some of the grid cell border will not show
SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION (Screenshot, video/gif, .mstr file, logs, etc):
read the full guidelines of logging defects.
